source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Editorial product UI with strong English hierarchy, Japanese guidance, story-friendly labels, and precise dashboard numbers.
layout: Rich 8px grids, aril-dot texture, rind-line navigation, storytelling panels, and dense data components.

prompts.label: Transparent pomegranate split motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Pomegranate transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a split pomegranate motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as one complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A ripe pomegranate split open to reveal ruby arils, deep red leathery rind, cream pith membranes, small orchard leaf-green leaves, woody stem, and rich fruit shadows. Botanical accuracy, crisp cutout edges, rich storytelling identity.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include split fruit, crown, leaves, and stem without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no apple, no grapefruit, no raspberry, no bowl, no hand, no orchard landscape, no text, no watermark, no loose aril pile dominating.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Pomegranate light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Pomegranate", derived from a split pomegranate cutout. This board is a source reference for a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible storytelling UI theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Pomegranate, Pomegranate Split, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract colors and interaction language from deep red rind, ruby arils, cream pith membranes, leaf-green orchard accents, woody stem browns, and rich fruit shadows. The board must read as pomegranate, not raspberry, cranberry, or generic red brand.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: rich storytelling system, 8px radius, pith-cream surfaces, pomegranate-red primary actions, ruby aril badges and chart points, leaf-green status, orchard-bark borders, rind-ink text, aril-dot texture, rind-line dividers.
Constraints: no raspberry drupelet texture, no apple branding, no generic red gradient, no wine imagery, no unrelated neon colors, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Pomegranate", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Pomegranate dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Pomegranate". It must feel like the light-mode board translated to dark mode and remain derived from the split pomegranate cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Pomegranate, Pomegranate Split, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve pomegranate-red active states, ruby aril highlights, cream pith text, rind-ink and orchard-bark dark surfaces, leaf-green status, aril-dot texture, storytelling panels, and 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid. Must read as pomegranate, not raspberry or generic red.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: rind-ink dark backgrounds, orchard-bark cards, cream pith foreground, pomegranate-red buttons, ruby chart points, leaf-green success, subtle aril-dot and pith-line overlays, crisp editorial controls.
Constraints: no raspberry, no wine, no neon red, no pure-black flat background, no generic red dashboard, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Pomegranate".
